SolStacker
Brand Book Draft
Solana yield allocation

Solana yield products curated from multiple sources.

A brand system for Cores, Auto Stack, Account, and Stats. Built to feel premium, restrained, and transparent without becoming a generic finance app.

Monochrome mark No gradient, glow, or 3D treatment

Foundation

SolStacker is the premium Solana yield layer for curated Cores, automated SOL accumulation, and unified Account management.

Core promise

Understand, compare, manage.

SolStacker turns Solana yield into products people can understand, compare, and manage from one Account.

Product belief

Users want products, not legs.

Most users do not want to assemble yield strategies leg by leg. They want a clear product, transparent composition, visible risk, and a manageable position.

Product Suite

The brand system is built around four product surfaces. Each surface has a clear job and should keep the user oriented.

Cores

Curated Solana yield products. Each Core has a thesis, composition, APY range, risk profile, liquidity behavior, and position lifecycle.

Auto Stack

Automatic SOL accumulation while waiting capital earns yield. Users deposit USDC, define execution rules, and track acquired SOL.

Account

The connected-wallet home for positions, pending executions, activity, allocation, and earned yield.

Stats

Transparent product and protocol-level metrics for TVL, yield distribution, volume, APY history, and composition.

Personality

The product should feel crypto-native and technically capable, but never chaotic or promotional.

Should Feel

  • Clear, not simplistic.
  • Premium, not decorative.
  • Calm, not sleepy.
  • Technical, not alienating.
  • Transparent, not defensive.

Should Not Feel

  • Like an APY farm.
  • Like a meme-heavy dashboard.
  • Like a generic bank app.
  • Like a trading terminal.
  • Like a Solana-gradient clone.

Voice

Copy should explain product behavior before yield, put risk beside opportunity, and use plain state language.

Product Before Yield

Cashflow combines stable lending and real-world yield sources.

Risk Beside Yield

High Yield Cores can include leverage, basis trades, or LP exposure.

Plain CTAs

Explore, Deposit, Preview, Confirm in Wallet, Details, Withdraw.

Logo

The existing stacked mark is preserved, but the brand removes Solana gradient treatment. Use the mark as a financial product symbol.

Black mark on light backgrounds.

White mark on dark backgrounds.

Color

Monochrome-first, with solid spectral accents for hover, focus, selected detail, and data emphasis. Default buttons stay monochrome.

neutral.950
#050505
neutral.900
#0D0D0B
neutral.50
#F7F6F2
accent.500
#8F46FF
signal.green
#14F195
signal.cyan
#00C2FF

Typography

Use a premium sans for product UI and a restrained mono for numbers, addresses, transaction IDs, and dense metrics.

RoleSizeUse
Display Large64 / 68Landing hero
Heading Large32 / 38Product page title
Body Medium15 / 22Product copy
Metric Large40 / 44Large numbers
Mono Small12 / 16Addresses and status

Product UI

Product UI should be restrained, data-supported, and action-oriented. These examples are directional, not final screen designs.

Cores

Solana yield products curated from multiple sources.

All Simple SOL RWA Markets Active High Yield

Cashflow

Stable lending and real-world yield sources.

APY7.4%
RiskLow
TVL$229M
Explore

Liquid Staking

Diversified SOL exposure across leading LSTs.

APY8.2%
RiskLow-Med
TVL$321M
Explore

Boost

Active yield using loops, basis, markets, and RWA exposure.

APY14.2%
RiskMed-High
TVL$167M
Explore

Account

Account should show ownership, yield, pending executions, activity, and allocation without becoming a trading terminal.

Account value

$84,213.42

24h +0.8% / 7d +2.4%

Risk composition
Source type
Product allocation

Cores vs Auto Stack

Use a donut chart for product allocation, stacked bars for granular source and risk breakdowns, and tables for exact values.

Token Appendix

Preliminary tokens for Figma library creation. These are draft values and should be reviewed visually before final implementation.

TokenValueUse
color.bg.default#050505Dark app background
color.surface.default#191917Default dark panel
color.action.default#FFFFFFDefault dark-mode button fill
color.action.hover#8F46FFHover/focus accent
radius.38pxCards and panels
space.624pxCommon panel padding
motion.base180msPanels and buttons
